title: Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals Judgeship and Reorganization Act of 2025
short_title: Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals Judgeship and Reorganization Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals Judgeship and Reorganization Act of 2025  This bill divides the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit into two judicial circuits: (1) the Ninth Circuit, and (2) a new Twelfth Circuit. The Ninth Circuit is composed of California, Guam, Hawaii, and Northern Mariana Islands. The new Twelfth Circuit is composed of Alaska, Arizona, Idaho, Montana, Nevada, Oregon, and Washington.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
